name: products_product
schema:
CREATE TABLE "products_product" (
   "id" INTEGER,
   "name" TEXT,
   "slug" TEXT,
   "summary" TEXT,
   "body" TEXT,
   "platform_links" TEXT,
   "support_url" TEXT,
   "status" TEXT,
   "featured" INTEGER,
   "meta_description" TEXT,
   "redirect_to_id" INTEGER REFERENCES "products_product"("id")
)
